stream_catalog.description: RGB camera frame: first-person viewer pixels on the remote backend when available, deterministic colorized proxy in the sim.
Visible mobs (id/distance/angle), every tick while any are visible; occluded by walls (line-of-sight), not just distance.
Nearest visible entity's salience + bearing, for the orienting reflex's stimulus localization contract (issue #60): 0.0/no direction when nothing is visible.
Exact Minecraft inventory names, on change.
Alive flag; flips once on death.
Distance from the spawn point, on change.
Biome under the agent, on change.
5x5 exact Minecraft block-name patch, on cell change.
Exact Minecraft block faced, on change.
Mouse/look control history: the LOOK_* delta commanded this tick (zero for every other action), every tick.
Exact item id + count gained, every gain (not just the first).
Crafting/smelting outcome: recipe id + exact inputs/outputs.
Milestone/advancement earned (vanilla id on a live server; sim.* on the simulated backend), once per episode.
Biome underfoot changed (event view of world.biome).
Named structure entered for the first time this episode.
Tool/weapon swung while equipped (issue #30 tool-use goal).

stream_registry.note: Alive flag; legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses BodyStateEncoder.
Health vital; legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses BodyStateEncoder.
Hotbar symbolic summary; legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses EntityEncoder.
Hunger vital; legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses BodyStateEncoder.
In-water flag; legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses BodyStateEncoder.
Inventory summary; legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses EntityEncoder.
Oxygen vital; legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses BodyStateEncoder.
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Semantic event mark (the 'why'); the felt effect is body.health, which is agent input -- this narration is an aux-loss target (issue #32).
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Semantic event mark; narration/aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).

Mouse/look control history (issue #32): the Minecraft SurvivalBox now publishes {d_yaw, d_pitch} every tick from the LOOK_* action taken (adapter.py); a near-raw motor stream, deliberately still 'raw' (no fusion slot / encoder) pending a dedicated encoder.
Reward scalar(s); legacy fusion scalar-encoded, neural path uses RewardEncoder.
Scalar distance, not a pose. Requires knowing the absolute spawn point -- a hand-computed reward-shaping convenience, not a raw proprioceptive signal (issue #32).
Position/rotation pose streams; proprioception (the agent's own embodiment), not a privileged world fact (issue #32).
Position/rotation pose streams; proprioception (the agent's own embodiment), not a privileged world fact (issue #32).

Visible entities; legacy fusion uses fixed summary, neural path uses EntityEncoder. Ground-truth id/distance/angle without vision processing -- an object-detection aux-loss target, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Coarse semantic grid frame: hand-classified per-cell tags (solid/water/resource/entity/agent), not raw pixels -- a debug/aux-loss target, demoted from agent input (issue #32).

Raw RGB pixel tensor. Deliberate fixed stub: no encoder is bound in the legacy scalar TemporalFusion layout -- it is reserved for a trainable PixelStreamEncoder (docs/neural-stream-agent.md Phase B, cognitive_runtime.neural). The one raw-ish stream in this *generic* registry; a frame region maps to a look direction, so it is the only localization_hint stream declared here (issue #32) -- a Program can declare its own (e.g. Minecraft's world.entity_bearing, issue #60).
Faced-block category; hand-written survival-heuristic sense, kept for debugging/aux loss, not raw agent input (issue #32).
Shelter flag; hand-written survival-heuristic sense, kept for debugging/aux loss, not raw agent input (issue #32).
